_meta.description: 登革热模型的外部事实、区域合理性参考和马里文项目设定来源。现实区域数据不得直接作为马里文观测值。

who_dengue_fact_sheet.title: Dengue and severe dengue
who_dengue_fact_sheet.limitations: Provides disease-level guidance, not Mariven-specific transition probabilities.

who_dengue_outbreak_toolbox.title: Dengue outbreak toolbox
who_dengue_outbreak_toolbox.limitations: Case definitions require local surveillance implementation and do not define Mariven alert thresholds.

who_wpro_dengue_surveillance.organization: WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific
who_wpro_dengue_surveillance.title: Dengue surveillance
who_wpro_dengue_surveillance.limitations: Country definitions and reporting practices differ; regional counts are not copied into Mariven.

who_wpro_situation_update_749.organization: WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific
who_wpro_situation_update_749.title: Dengue Situation Update #749
who_wpro_situation_update_749.limitations: Used to check regional plausibility as of the design date; it is not a runtime data feed.

fiji_2025_outbreak_end.organization: Fiji Ministry of Health and Medical Services
fiji_2025_outbreak_end.title: Ministry Declares the End of the Dengue Fever Outbreak for the Western and Central Division
fiji_2025_outbreak_end.limitations: Fiji totals are not population-scaled or copied into Mariven.

mariven_wmar1.limitations: wMar-1 is fictional project canon. Laboratory and semi-field efficacy claims are not treated as real evidence or direct province-level effectiveness.
